⚙️ Settings

Configure preprocessing, segmentation, classification & grading parameters

🔧 Preprocessing
Use purely mathematical unsupervised machine learning (K-Means + GrabCut) to segment grains based on color. Highly robust without needing neural networks.
Deep-learning segmenter. Disabled by default because CPU inference is too slow for web requests.
